name: Harrells.com
message: Based in Lakeland, Florida since 1941, Harrells is a leading producer and distributor of customized, agronomic solutions not merely products. This includes nutritional solutions in both granular and liquid form to help your turf, landscape and plants grow and thrive. We also specialize in delivering solutions to help protect your world from pests, environmental threats and climate extremes. Naturally, we have production and storage facilities throughout the country to ensure timely, efficient shipments.
